source.note: 2026-07 audit: prior p0-p3/skill/burst values did not match GO/Amber Lv10 data at all (each hit off by a different, non-level-aligned ratio -- likely stale/hand-entered before the goCommit pointer was added). Re-derived from allStat_gen.json skillParam.Klee at commit 2937f8a80846b18c3495b7657c0bae5c78c82606, cross-checked against Amber avatar/10000029 talent[0].promote['10'] (identical). Added plunging (previously missing entirely). Renamed all hit_definitions_json keys/sections to match GO's real target paths (normal/{0,1,2}, charged/dmg, plunging/{dmg,low,high}, skill/{jumptyDumptyDmg,mineDmg}, burst/dmg) -- a leaderboard built with GO's own naming was failing with 'no hit definition' errors against the old hand-picked key names (hit1Dmg, chargedDmg, jumpyDumptyBounce (note: GO spells it 'jumpty', not 'jumpy'), sparksDmg). multKey lookups are scoped per-section by damage_evaluator_service.evaluate_build (talent_multipliers_json[path[0]]), so charged/passive1 duplicate the same p3_mult value rather than sharing one. Added passive1/dmg (A1 Sparks 'n' Splash: Charged Attack DMG with a permanent +50% Charged DMG Bonus baked in via the hit-scoped passive1dmg_dmg_ key, self_modifiers_json below; GO's asc>=1 gate and Homework-only lockBadge_mult_ are both always-true/1x for a standard built character and are not modeled separately) and constellation1/chainedReactionsDmg (C1: reuses the burst formula at 120% MV, pre-baked into chainedReactionsDmg_mult = burst p0_mult x 1.2). 2026-07-15 follow-up: the hit existed but had no documented average trigger rate, so every leaderboard rotation referencing it had to hand-guess a weight (the two existing ones, ids 330/333, both used an undocumented '9.6, empirical approximation'). Confirmed via community wiki the real mechanic: the spark-summon chance starts at 0% right after a proc/reset, +8% on every failed check, and is checked once per USE (not per hit instance) of Klee's Normal Attack, Charged Attack, Elemental Skill, or Elemental Burst -- a pity Markov chain like Echoes of an Offering's 4pc. p_k = min(1, 0.08*(k-1)) for the k-th check since the last proc, so a miss streak is capped at 13 (guaranteed on the 14th check). E[cycle length] = sum_{k=0..13} P(fail first k) = 5.12508 checks/proc, i.e. a long-run average trigger rate of 1/E = 19.512% per check -- this is the number any rotation should multiply by its own count of NA/CA/Skill/Burst *uses* (not hit/tick instances) to get the correct chainedReactionsDmg weight. Recomputed the two existing leaderboards' weight against this (see their rotation target descriptions) rather than leaving it as an unexplained guess; not baked into self_modifiers_json because this is a discrete burst-scaled hit (crit/buffs must apply independently), not a flat stat bonus that could be pre-averaged onto another attack type the way Echoes'/Furina's fixes were. Also added self_conditional_modifiers_json.c1HexereiAtkBuff: confirmed via two independent community sources (KQM quick guide + BitTopup C0 guide) that v6.2's Hexerei rework gave C1's Hexerei-enhanced text an extra clause not in the pre-rework wiki description: 'For 12s after triggering the above effect, Klee's ATK is increased by 60%' (requires the Witch's Homework quest + >=2 Hexerei party members, same gate as Razor/Venti/Mona/Prune/Lohen's Hexerei conditionals already in this codebase) -- a manual leaderboard-admin toggle like Prune's hexereiAtkSelf, not auto-applied, since whether the team meets the Hexerei requirement is leaderboard/team-comp-specific. FLAGGED, NOT YET MODELED (v6.2 Hexerei rework, confirmed real via KQM/BitTopup/GameWith but exact mechanics unconfirmed or too involved for this pass -- needs its own follow-up): (1) the base-kit 'Boom Badge' mechanic (Klee's Witch's Eve Rite, also gated on the Homework quest + 2 Hexerei members): Normal Attack/Skill/Burst each independently grant up to 1 Boom Badge (20s duration, own timer per attack type, so up to 3 stacked), and while holding 1/2/3 badges her Charged Attack 'Boom-Boom Strike' deals 115%/130%/150% DMG -- this is very likely what GO's dismissed-as-'always 1x' lockBadge_mult_ (mentioned above re: passive1/dmg) actually represents; the badge-GAIN chance/guarantee per attack isn't confirmed by any source checked, so implementing it now would risk guessing that key number; (2) C2 rework: Elemental Skill hit now decreases opponent DEF by 23% for 10s (not previously modeled at all); (3) C4 rework: leaving the field while Sparks 'n' Splash is active (or it ending naturally) triggers an explosion for 555% ATK AoE Pyro DMG, +100% (to ~1110%) if Klee is on-field for it -- would need a new constellation4 hit; (4) C6 rework: changed from a team-wide 10% Pyro DMG bonus to a Klee-self 50% Pyro DMG bonus for 25s -- current data has no C6 buff at all, so this is a straight addition once confirmed.

self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Witch's Eve Rite (Hexerei: Secret Rite, requires >=2 Hexerei party members): C1 Chained Reactions' spark-bombard effect additionally grants Klee ATK +60% for 12s after it triggers.
